flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at North Central Michigan College rose 47% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.5k → $14.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at North Central Michigan College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.5k → $5.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at North Central Michigan College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.7k → $10.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at North Central Michigan College fell 16% between 2006 and 2009 (15.9% → 13.3%).
